title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Mejiro
Dober...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Mejiro Dober's gaze and see a claw
machine filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-they just happened to catch my eye. They're
pretty well designed and whatnot...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They're designed really well. You can tell
everyone apart from their features too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I could win a bunch of them... Maybe
I'll give it a—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I could win a bunch of them... Maybe
I'll give it a—

text_block_list.name: High School Girls
text_block_list.text:
Look, they have a claw machine! Someone should
try playing it! It'd be hilarious! Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
